name: tokumx
explanation: TokuMX is a deprecated MongoDB fork. The check uses a vendored pymongo client (`MongoClient`) and requires a full MongoDB URI in the form `mongodb://<USER>:<PASSWORD>@<HOST>:<PORT>/<DATABASE>`. Authenticated access to MongoDB-style admin commands (`serverStatus`, replica-set state) is the norm in production deployments, and the URI must encode credentials. Like the `mongo` integration, real deployments fall through to credential discovery, which is out of scope for wire-only autodiscovery. Pattern D / E.
notes: TokuMX is end-of-life; auto-config feasibility is moot but classification matches the parent mongo integration.
